Kickflip Daddy Long Legs Seat - Pleated w/ Gripp Tape - Black - FL '08-'23

Made in the U.S.A.

Maverick Daddy Long Legs Seat - Black - Smooth - FL '08-'23
Molded one-piece foam foundation covered with premium-grade black vinyl on a 16-gauge powder-coated steel base plate

Comfortable seat that retains a custom look
Seat bottom carpeted to protect the fender
Gives the driver an extra 2" of leg room
Made in the USA
